name: Cheddar Chili Cheesecake#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Butter a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Mix breadcrumbs and 1/4 cup cheddar cheese. Sprinkle the mixture into the pan, turning to coat. Refrigerate.
4. Dice about half of the ham; reserve the remaining slices.
5. In a blender or processor, mix diced ham with the remaining ingredients until smooth.
6. Pour slightly more than half of the filling into the prepared pan.
7. Top with the reserved ham slices in an even layer.
8. Cover with the remaining filling.
9. Place the pan on a baking sheet. Bake for 1 1/4 hours.
10. Turn off the oven and let the cheesecake cool to room temperature with the door slightly ajar. Transfer to a rack. Remove the sides of the pan. Cool before serving.
